name: GT-jordan-schwarz
source: VLW arXiv:2604.08380, refs/vlw-2604.08380/paper.tex:557-560 (Lemma, Jordan-Schwarz inequality, cites Stormer Lem.7.3), VERBATIM: "Let $T:L(\H)\to L(\K)$ be a unital, positive map. Then \jp{Ta^*}{Ta} \le T\jp{a^*}a , \qquad a\in L(\H)." where \jp{x}{y}=x o y is the Jordan product (paper.tex:42). For self-adjoint a=a^*: (Ta)^2 = Ta o Ta <= T(a o a) = T(a^2). Instantiated at T=Phi (unital positive on B(H)_sa).
